note: Copy this file to tt-deploy-ids.json (gitignored) and fill from Apps Script → Project settings / Manage deployments. Do not commit real ids to public forks.
noteTokenBrokerDeployments: tokenBrokerDeploymentId and tokenBrokerApiExecutableDeploymentId may match when one deployment is API-executable and Web.
noteApiExecutable: API URL: https://script.googleapis.com/v1/scripts/{API_EXECUTABLE_DEPLOYMENT_ID}:run — must be the API Executable row, not the script project id.
